$comment: Shared/public root side-effect policy. Keep allowlists narrow and tied to explicit init/service owners.

allowedRoots.justification: This contract root intentionally declares reusable Zod operation schemas at import time for shared scenario AI consumers.
allowedRoots.reviewNote: Keep executable schema construction confined to this explicit contract root; move runtime registration or mutation logic out of the root.

allowedRoots.justification: The logger root intentionally owns the singleton method allowlist used by shared logger instances.
allowedRoots.reviewNote: Keep import-time logger singleton setup confined to this explicit service root.

allowedRoots.justification: The message tracer root intentionally owns shared tracer initialization state.
allowedRoots.reviewNote: Keep import-time tracer singleton setup confined to this explicit service root.

allowedRoots.justification: This UI owner root intentionally defines reusable class-name constants for the annotatable image surface component set.
allowedRoots.reviewNote: Keep import-time work limited to declarative styling constants and component definitions.

allowedRoots.justification: This UI owner root intentionally declares reusable React toolbar components with forwardRef at import time.
allowedRoots.reviewNote: Keep import-time work limited to declarative component definitions and styling constants.

allowedRoots.justification: This UI owner root intentionally declares reusable control class-name sets at import time.
allowedRoots.reviewNote: Keep import-time work limited to declarative styling constants.
